sentence_reviews.text: A memory-augmented neural network couples a controller to differentiable external storage so it can read, write, and manipulate information beyond hidden state.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Reviewed as synthesis across cited source pointers and, where applicable, the canonical atlas graph context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Former ambiguity resolved by narrowing the audit interpretation to synthesis support rather than requiring exact-source wording.

sentence_reviews.text: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Differentiable memory read/write, Self-attention.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.

sentence_reviews.text: Memory-augmented neural networks is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Differentiable memory read/write.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: The cited source provides background on neural memory and differentiable computation but not a dedicated definition of MANNs.
sentence_reviews.notes: The relationship is central to the model family, though the cited source is indirect.

sentence_reviews.text: Memory-augmented neural networks is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Recurrence & feedback state.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning supports recurrent neural sequence models and hidden-state feedback.
sentence_reviews.notes: Many MANN controllers are recurrent, but the claim should not imply recurrence is universal.

sentence_reviews.text: Memory-augmented neural networks consumes, emits, or organizes information using Embeddings & distributed representations.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Deep Learning supports distributed representations as a general neural-network substrate.
sentence_reviews.notes: Defensible as a broad neural representation claim, not a direct source statement about MANNs.

sentence_reviews.text: In this atlas graph, Memory-augmented neural networks is modeled as depending on Differentiable memory read/write, Self-attention and feeding downstream nodes such as Conversational assistants & chatbots, Robotics & embodied AI.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: data/atlas.json canonical node and dependency graph; generated from node dependencies and downstream consumers.
sentence_reviews.notes: This is an explicit internal atlas-graph positioning claim, not an external-world necessity claim.

edge_reviews.notes: Core relationship is technically defensible, but the cited source is indirect.
The relationship is common for controller-based memory models, though not universal.
Distributed representations are a defensible common representation substrate for neural memory models.
